curation.synopsis: Marshal Brant's crusade against the greenskins, collected in full. After orks lay waste to the Black Templars' home of Solemnus, Brant swears vengeance and carries his shattered brotherhood to Armageddon, a hive-world synonymous with endless war. In Crusade for Armageddon the Templars wage their own holy quest amid the largest ork invasion the planet has known, while in Conquest of Armageddon a search for a lost company drags them into the jungles to confront the Blood Scar tribe and a hidden plot of renegade Space Marines. Gathering both novels alongside shorter tales of the Solemnus Crusade, this omnibus follows zealous warriors for whom faith, vengeance and duty are inseparable.

rating.reason: Print-on-demand omnibus with only 7 Goodreads ratings; sample too small for a representative aggregate.

collects.basis: Armageddon omnibus follows the Black Templars duology
